description: Enhance the search experience with unified multi-source results and improve the discover page with AI recommendations powered by multi-source data. Add dynamic color theming using extracted album artwork colors throughout the UI.
steps: Update app/page.tsx (home/search page) to use the unified search from lib/music-service.ts. When searching, combine results from multiple providers into one cohesive result set. Ensure the existing filter/sort functionality still works. The SearchBar component suggestions should include results from both iTunes and Spotify.

Update app/components/SearchBar.tsx to show richer autocomplete suggestions that may include Spotify artist images and additional metadata when available. Keep existing trending searches, recent searches, and voice search functionality intact.

Create app/components/DynamicColorTheme.tsx - A client component that wraps sections and applies dynamic background gradients extracted from artwork using the existing useColorExtraction hook from lib/color-extraction.ts. Use CSS custom properties to apply colors to hero backgrounds, accent colors, and gradients.

Update app/components/DynamicColorProvider.tsx to support setting colors from album/artist artwork on detail pages. When a track/artist/album page loads, extract colors and apply them to CSS custom properties (--dynamic-accent, --dynamic-accent-light, --dynamic-accent-muted) already defined in globals.css.

Update app/discover/page.tsx to include an enhanced recommendations section that uses data from multiple providers. Add a section showing 'Recommended for You' based on AI discovery (lib/ai-discovery.ts) but enriched with Last.fm similar artist data.

Update app/components/RecommendationPanel.tsx to show recommendation reasons more prominently. Each recommendation card should display a short explanation (already supported via RecommendedTrack.reason). Enhance the visual styling to use dynamic colors from the source track artwork.
acceptance_criteria: Search results combine data from multiple providers into a unified display
SearchBar autocomplete works with enriched suggestions
Dynamic color theming applies extracted artwork colors to hero sections on detail pages
CSS custom properties (--dynamic-accent etc.) are updated when viewing artist/track/album pages
Discover page shows multi-source powered recommendations
All existing search functionality (filters, sorts, voice, keyboard nav) continues working
npm run build succeeds with zero errors
